title: wedelia oxylepis
intro: Wedelia oxylepis, also known as Yellow Daisy or Butterfly Weed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves and flowers are used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and flowers of Wedelia oxylepis have been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help in treating wounds, skin irritations, and other health issues. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and topical applications, and is also used in folk remedies to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
